# STRAT.030 ? Attachment Theory (Bowlby/Ainsworth)

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** psychological_frameworks

**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Secure, anxious, avoidant styles; internal working models; proximity seeking; safe haven; secure base; attachment across lifespan

## Application
Recognize attachment patterns; provide secure base; be safe haven; understand working models; support security; repair ruptures

## Key Values
- Secure attachment
- Safe haven
- Secure base
- Pattern recognition
- Relational security
